brand.name: RSMK Technologies
brand.mission: To build a complete ecosystem of tools that make life easier and become useful in everyday life.
brand.philosophy: Output first. Tuning later. Accuracy finally.
brand.belief: AI may not take your job, but the person using it might.
brand.legacy_vision: Be the end user to understand the real problem. Only then can you build the real solution.
brand.description: RSMK Technologies is a personal technology ecosystem and branding initiative created to host, manage, and expand innovative digital products, AI systems, tools, and experimental platforms. The ecosystem is focused on practical utility, productivity, accessibility, and intelligent digital experiences.

founder.background: B.Tech Undergraduate in Electrical and Electronics Engineering with strong interest in AI, Embedded Systems, IoT, Productivity Engineering, and Automation Technologies.
founder.engineering_style: Rapid prototyping and iterative improvement. Builds functional systems first, improves performance continuously, and refines accuracy over time.
founder.motivation: Curiosity, experimentation, and interest in emerging technologies.

mani.name: Mani
mani.meaning: The name Mani originates from the creator's personal identity and represents the M in RSMK.
mani.description: Project Mani is the personalized AI assistant ecosystem of RSMK Technologies. It provides intelligent support, contextual responses, platform guidance, and workflow automation across all RSMK websites and products.
mani.purpose: To create a personal AI assistant that communicates and responds naturally, understands ecosystem-specific platforms, and provides targeted assistance across all RSMK products.
mani.differentiator: Unlike generic AI chatbots, Mani understands ecosystem-specific platforms, provides targeted assistance, answers product-specific questions, and evolves alongside the tools developed by RSMK Technologies.
